title: The Seven Deadly Sins
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (24) + Signs of Holy War (4, eps 25-28) + Revival of the Commandments (24, eps 29-52) + Wrath of the Gods (24, eps 53-76) + Dragon's Judgement (24, eps 77-100) = 100 total.
